title: senecio tagetes
intro: Senecio tagetes, also known as Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe, western Asia, and northwestern Africa. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Groundsel include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive problems and skin conditions. Groundsel can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic benefits.
